brief.speaker: pharaoh
brief.text: Any delivery of 500 units or fewer. Such quantities are unusual. Find them. Include 500 itself.

expected.sql: SELECT overseer, year, amount FROM granary WHERE amount <= 500

hints.text: Pharaoh: 'Far too many. 500 is the ceiling, not 5000.'
Pharaoh: '500 itself must be included. The operator I want means less OR equal.'
Pharaoh: 'Anything up to and including 500 units.'

success.speaker: pharaoh
success.text: One entry. One. Hemiunu. Year 9. 420 units of grain. Who is this man?
